entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT-RICH FOODS
entities.description: Foods containing high levels of antioxidants that provide health benefits and prevent diseases

entities.name: HUMAN HEALTH
entities.description: The overall state of physical and mental well-being of humans

entities.name: DISEASE PREVENTION
entities.description: The process of reducing the risk of developing diseases through dietary or medical interventions

entities.name: PLANT SECONDARY METABOLITES
entities.description: Organic compounds produced by plants that are not directly involved in growth or development but often provide nutraceutical properties

entities.name: NUTRACEUTICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Health-promoting properties of food components that provide medical or health benefits

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass crops cultivated for their edible grains, used as targets for functional food development

entities.name: SOLANACEAE
entities.description: A family of flowering plants including potatoes and tomatoes, used as targets for functional food development

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL FOOD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating foods that provide health benefits beyond basic nutrition

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plant origin with actual or potential value for breeding and development

entities.name: METABOLIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The practice of optimizing genetic and regulatory processes within cells to increase the production of specific metabolites

entities.name: NATURAL BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life and genetic diversity found in nature

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL STRATEGIES
entities.description: Techniques using biological systems or living organisms to increase antioxidant levels in crops

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT LEVEL
entities.description: The concentration of antioxidant compounds within grains and fruits

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Methods used in the cultivation of crops that can impact their antioxidant properties

entities.name: FOOD PROCESSING
entities.description: Techniques used to transform raw ingredients into food that can impact antioxidant properties

entities.name: PRE-CLINICAL STUDIES
entities.description: Research conducted in vitro or in animals before human clinical trials

entities.name: CLINICAL STUDIES
entities.description: Research studies performed with human participants to prove the impact of foods on health

entities.name: IN VITRO STUDIES
entities.description: Studies performed with biological molecules or cells outside their normal biological context

entities.name: ANIMAL STUDIES
entities.description: Research conducted on non-human animals to support health claims

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that antioxidant-rich diets aim to prevent
